description: Small fragment of a state document addressing "[...] al-amīrī al-kabīrī al-ʿaḍudī al-naṣrī." It seems that only one line and a few words of another line of the original are preserved, and the other lines were later filled in as a copying exercise. Verso blank. Folds; verso shows signs of having been sandwiched into a book binding; but no pinholes.
description_he: שבר קטן ממסמך ממלכתי המופנה ל'[...] אל-אמירי אל-כבירי אל-עד'ודי אל-נצרי'; נראה שנשמרה רק שורה אחת ומילות שורה אחרת; הגב ריק
